label: Austin, TX
text: STR enforcement details added. Platform data-sharing agreement now in effect. License required for all STRs.

label: Los Angeles, CA
text: Home-sharing registration fee confirmed at $183. Platform fee collection verified via planning.lacity.gov.

label: Honolulu, HI
text: OTA tax rate confirmed at 3%. Voucher program details added from honolulu.gov source.

label: Asheville, NC
text: Homestay permit fee confirmed at $200. Source: City fee schedule, miscellaneous permits section.

label: Orlando, FL
text: Correction: whole-home STRs not permitted in most zones. Previous data flagged as inaccurate — verified via city ordinance.

label: Atlanta, GA
text: Primary residence requirement confirmed. Short-term rental ordinance under active council review.
